mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT s.user_id) FROM sys_log sl INNER JOIN student s ON sl.user_id = s.user_id WHERE sl.add_datetime >= #{startDate} AND sl.add_datetime < #{endDate}

WITH UserLogsWithNext AS ( SELECT LEAD(add_datetime, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY creator ORDER BY add_datetime ASC) AS next_add_datetime, add_datetime FROM learning_log WHERE add_datetime >= #{startDate} AND add_datetime < #{endDate} ) SELECT COALESCE(SUM( CASE -- 使用时间差计算秒数，适配达梦数据库 WHEN DATEDIFF(SECOND, add_datetime, next_add_datetime) BETWEEN 55 AND 65 THEN 60 -- 累加60秒 ELSE 0 END ), 0) AS total_reading_seconds FROM UserLogsWithNext;

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT s.user_id) FROM sys_log sl INNER JOIN student s ON sl.user_id = s.user_id WHERE -- 使用 >= 和 < 来避免 XML 解析错误 sl.add_datetime >= CURRENT_DATE AND sl.add_datetime < (CURRENT_DATE + 1)

WITH TimeGroupedLogs AS ( SELECT DISTINCT s.user_id, CASE WHEN EXTRACT(HOUR FROM sl.add_datetime) BETWEEN 0 AND 3 THEN '0:00-4:00' WHEN EXTRACT(HOUR FROM sl.add_datetime) BETWEEN 4 AND 7 THEN '4:00-8:00' WHEN EXTRACT(HOUR FROM sl.add_datetime) BETWEEN 8 AND 11 THEN '8:00-12:00' WHEN EXTRACT(HOUR FROM sl.add_datetime) BETWEEN 12 AND 15 THEN '12:00-16:00' WHEN EXTRACT(HOUR FROM sl.add_datetime) BETWEEN 16 AND 19 THEN '16:00-20:00' ELSE '20:00-24:00' END AS time_slot FROM sys_log sl INNER JOIN student s ON sl.user_id = s.user_id WHERE sl.add_datetime >= CURRENT_DATE AND sl.add_datetime < (CURRENT_DATE + 1) ) SELECT time_slot AS timeSlot, COUNT(user_id) AS value FROM TimeGroupedLogs GROUP BY time_slot ORDER BY time_slot;

SELECT
(((sl.add_datetime AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Shanghai')::date)::timestamp as date, COUNT(DISTINCT s.user_id) as visitorCount FROM sys_log sl INNER JOIN student s ON sl.user_id = s.user_id WHERE ((sl.add_datetime AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Shanghai')::date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY date ORDER BY date ASC

WITH UserLogsWithNext AS ( SELECT LEAD(add_datetime, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY creator ORDER BY add_datetime ASC) AS next_add_datetime, add_datetime FROM learning_log WHERE add_datetime >= CURRENT_DATE AND add_datetime < (CURRENT_DATE + 1) ) SELECT COALESCE(SUM( CASE -- 使用 age() 函数计算可靠的时间间隔(interval)，再用 EXTRACT 提取总秒数 WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM age(next_add_datetime, add_datetime)) BETWEEN 55 AND 65 THEN 60 -- 累加60秒 ELSE 0 END ), 0) AS total_reading_seconds FROM UserLogsWithNext;

WITH UserLogsWithNext AS ( SELECT LEAD(add_datetime, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY creator ORDER BY add_datetime ASC) AS next_add_datetime, add_datetime, CASE WHEN DATEPART(HOUR, add_datetime) BETWEEN 0 AND 3 THEN '0:00-4:00' WHEN DATEPART(HOUR, add_datetime) BETWEEN 4 AND 7 THEN '4:00-8:00' WHEN DATEPART(HOUR, add_datetime) BETWEEN 8 AND 11 THEN '8:00-12:00' WHEN DATEPART(HOUR, add_datetime) BETWEEN 12 AND 15 THEN '12:00-16:00' WHEN DATEPART(HOUR, add_datetime) BETWEEN 16 AND 19 THEN '16:00-20:00' ELSE '20:00-24:00' END AS time_slot FROM learning_log WHERE add_datetime >= CURRENT_DATE AND add_datetime < (CURRENT_DATE + 1) ), DurationCalculations AS ( SELECT time_slot, CASE -- 使用时间差计算秒数，适配达梦数据库 WHEN DATEDIFF(SECOND, add_datetime, next_add_datetime) BETWEEN 55 AND 65 THEN 60 -- 累加60秒 ELSE 0 END AS duration_seconds FROM UserLogsWithNext ) SELECT time_slot as timeSlot, COALESCE(SUM(duration_seconds), 0) AS value FROM DurationCalculations GROUP BY time_slot ORDER BY time_slot;

WITH UserLogsWithNext AS ( SELECT add_datetime, LEAD(add_datetime, 1) OVER ( PARTITION BY creator ORDER BY add_datetime ASC ) AS next_add_datetime FROM learning_log WHERE add_datetime >= #{startDate} AND add_datetime < #{endDate} + 1 ) SELECT TRUNC(add_datetime) AS "date", -- ★ 别名改成 date COALESCE( SUM( CASE WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, add_datetime, next_add_datetime) BETWEEN 55 AND 65 THEN 60 ELSE 0 END ), 0 ) AS durationInSeconds FROM UserLogsWithNext WHERE next_add_datetime IS NOT NULL GROUP BY TRUNC(add_datetime) ORDER BY "date" ASC

WITH DateSeries AS ( -- 步骤 1: 生成一个完整的日期/周/月序列 SELECT DATE_TRUNC(#{type}, series_date) AS date_group FROM -- 使用 generate_series 生成从开始到结束的每一天 generate_series(#{startTime}::date, #{endTime}::date, '1 day'::interval) AS series_date GROUP BY date_group -- 按指定的类型(day/week/month)对序列进行分组，确保唯一性 ), UserLogsWithNext AS ( -- 步骤 2: (不变) 计算每条日志的下一条日志时间 SELECT creator, add_datetime, LEAD(add_datetime, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY creator ORDER BY add_datetime ASC) AS next_add_datetime FROM learning_log WHERE add_datetime >= #{startTime} AND add_datetime < #{endTime} ), DurationCalculated AS ( -- 步骤 3: (不变) 计算每条日志的有效时长 SELECT add_datetime, CASE WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM age(next_add_datetime, add_datetime)) BETWEEN 55 AND 65 THEN 60 ELSE 0 END AS duration_seconds FROM UserLogsWithNext WHERE next_add_datetime IS NOT NULL ), AggregatedDurations AS ( -- 步骤 4: 按指定类型(day/week/month)聚合实际的学习时长 SELECT DATE_TRUNC(#{type}, add_datetime) AS date_group, SUM(duration_seconds) AS total_duration FROM DurationCalculated GROUP BY date_group ) -- 步骤 5: 将完整日期序列与有数据的学习时长进行左连接 SELECT -- 根据统计类型格式化日期标签 CASE WHEN #{type} = 'day' THEN TO_CHAR(ds.date_group, 'YYYY-MM-DD') WHEN #{type} = 'month' THEN TO_CHAR(ds.date_group, 'YYYY-MM') WHEN #{type} = 'week' THEN TO_CHAR(ds.date_group, 'YYYY-WW') -- 'WW' 代表一年中的第几周 END AS dateLabel,
-- 如果 ad.total_duration 为 NULL (即当天无记录), 则返回 0 COALESCE(ad.total_duration, 0) AS duration FROM DateSeries ds LEFT JOIN AggregatedDurations ad ON ds.date_group = ad.date_group ORDER BY ds.date_group ASC;

WITH ReaderCounts AS ( -- 1. 阅读人数 SELECT textbook_id, COUNT(DISTINCT creator) AS readerCount FROM learning_log
AND add_datetime >= TO_TIMESTAMP(#{params.startTime}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
AND add_datetime <= TO_TIMESTAMP(#{params.endTime}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
GROUP BY textbook_id ), ReadingDurations AS ( -- 2. 阅读时长（分钟） SELECT textbook_id, COUNT(*) AS readingDurationMinutes FROM ( SELECT textbook_id, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM age(LEAD(add_datetime, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY creator, textbook_id ORDER BY add_datetime), add_datetime)) as diff_seconds FROM learning_log
AND add_datetime >= TO_TIMESTAMP(#{params.startTime}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
AND add_datetime <= TO_TIMESTAMP(#{params.endTime}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
) AS durations WHERE diff_seconds BETWEEN 55 AND 65 GROUP BY textbook_id ), ActivityCounts AS ( -- 3. 教学活动数量 SELECT textbook_id, COUNT(*) AS teachingActivityCount FROM discussion_topic WHERE identity_type = 1 GROUP BY textbook_id ), FeedbackCounts AS ( -- 4. 交流反馈数量 SELECT t.id as textbook_id, COUNT(dtr.id) AS communicationFeedbackCount FROM textbook t LEFT JOIN discussion_topic dt ON t.id = dt.textbook_id LEFT JOIN discussion_topic_reply dtr ON dt.id = dtr.topic_id GROUP BY t.id ) -- 5. 组合并计算热度值 SELECT t.id AS "textbookId", t.textbook_name AS "textbookName", COALESCE(rc.readerCount, 0) AS "readerCount", COALESCE(rd.readingDurationMinutes, 0) AS "readingDurationMinutes", COALESCE(ac.teachingActivityCount, 0) AS "teachingActivityCount", COALESCE(fc.communicationFeedbackCount, 0) AS "communicationFeedbackCount", ( COALESCE(rc.readerCount, 0) * 10 + COALESCE(rd.readingDurationMinutes, 0) * 2 + COALESCE(ac.teachingActivityCount, 0) * 5 + COALESCE(fc.communicationFeedbackCount, 0) * 3 ) AS "readingDuration" FROM textbook t LEFT JOIN ReaderCounts rc ON t.id = rc.textbook_id LEFT JOIN ReadingDurations rd ON t.id = rd.textbook_id LEFT JOIN ActivityCounts ac ON t.id = ac.textbook_id LEFT JOIN FeedbackCounts fc ON t.id = fc.textbook_id WHERE t.release_status = '1' ORDER BY "readingDuration" DESC

SELECT tc.classification_name AS typeName, -- 使用COALESCE确保没有阅读记录的类型也显示为0 COALESCE(SUM(calculated_durations.readingDuration), 0) AS readingDuration FROM textbook_classification tc LEFT JOIN ( -- 步骤1: 关联教材表，为后续按类型分组做准备 SELECT t.classification, calculated_log.readingDuration FROM textbook t JOIN ( -- 步骤2: 预先计算出每个教材的总阅读时长 SELECT log_with_next_time.textbook_id, SUM( CASE WHEN (EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM log_with_next_time.next_add_datetime) - EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM log_with_next_time.add_datetime)) BETWEEN 55 AND 65 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) AS readingDuration FROM ( -- 步骤3: 使用窗口函数获取下一条学习记录的时间 SELECT textbook_id, creator, add_datetime, LEAD(add_datetime, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY creator, textbook_id ORDER BY add_datetime) AS next_add_datetime FROM learning_log
AND add_datetime >= TO_TIMESTAMP(#{startTime}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
AND add_datetime <= TO_TIMESTAMP(#{endTime}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
) AS log_with_next_time GROUP BY log_with_next_time.textbook_id ) AS calculated_log ON t.id = calculated_log.textbook_id WHERE t.release_status = '1' ) AS calculated_durations ON tc.id = calculated_durations.classification GROUP BY tc.classification_name ORDER BY readingDuration DESC

SELECT tc.id AS "chapterId", REGEXP_REPLACE( REGEXP_REPLACE(tc.catalog_name, E'<[^>]+>', '', 'g'), E' ', ' ', 'g' ) AS "chapterName", CASE WHEN COUNT(qbl.question_id) = 0 THEN -1 -- 表示该章节没有题目 WHEN SUM(qbl.score) > 0 THEN ROUND((SUM(sec.score) / SUM(qbl.score)) * 100, 2) ELSE 0 END AS "masteryPercentage", COUNT(qbl.question_id) AS "questionCount" FROM textbook_catalog tc LEFT JOIN teaching_question_bank tqb ON tc.id = tqb.textbook_catalog_id LEFT JOIN questions_banks_list qbl ON tqb.id = qbl.bank_id LEFT JOIN student_final_grade sfg ON tqb.id = sfg.bank_id AND sfg.student_id = #{studentId} -- Using LATERAL JOIN to efficiently get the latest exercise record for the student in the specific question bank LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT ser.id FROM student_exercises_record ser WHERE ser.student_id = #{studentId} AND ser.teaching_question_bank_id = tqb.id AND ser.status = 2 ORDER BY ser.operation_datetime DESC LIMIT 1 ) latest_record ON true LEFT JOIN student_exercises_content sec ON qbl.bank_id = sec.teaching_question_bank_id AND qbl.question_id = sec.teaching_question AND sec.record_id = latest_record.id WHERE tc.textbook_id = #{textbookId} GROUP BY tc.id, tc.catalog_name ORDER BY tc.id

SELECT tc.classification_name AS name, COUNT(t.id) AS value FROM textbook t LEFT JOIN textbook_classification tc ON t.classification = tc.id WHERE t.release_status = '1' GROUP BY tc.classification_name ORDER BY value DESC

SELECT t.id AS textbookId, tr.id AS textbookReviewId, t.textbook_name AS textbookName, tr.add_datetime AS applicationSubmitTime, tr.reason_for_review AS reasonForReview, tr.submit_for_review_description AS submitForReviewDescription, COALESCE(tch.name, s.name, su.username) AS applicantName FROM textbook_review tr LEFT JOIN textbook t ON tr.textbook_id = t.id LEFT JOIN teacher tch ON tr.creator = tch.user_id LEFT JOIN student s ON tr.creator = s.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_tbuser su ON tr.creator = su.id WHERE tr.reason_for_review = 2
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM textbook t2 WHERE t2.id = tr.textbook_id AND t2.creator = #{userId} UNION SELECT 1 FROM textbook_authority ta WHERE ta.textbook_id = tr.textbook_id AND ta.user_id = #{userId} )
ORDER BY tr.add_datetime DESC

WITH ReaderCounts AS ( -- 1. 阅读人数 SELECT textbook_id, COUNT(DISTINCT creator) AS readerCount FROM learning_log GROUP BY textbook_id ), ReadingDurations AS ( -- 2. 阅读时长（分钟） SELECT textbook_id, COUNT(*) AS readingDurationMinutes FROM ( SELECT textbook_id, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM age(LEAD(add_datetime, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY creator, textbook_id ORDER BY add_datetime), add_datetime)) as diff_seconds FROM learning_log ) AS durations WHERE diff_seconds BETWEEN 55 AND 65 GROUP BY textbook_id ), ActivityCounts AS ( -- 3. 教学活动数量 SELECT textbook_id, COUNT(*) AS teachingActivityCount FROM discussion_topic WHERE identity_type = 1 GROUP BY textbook_id ), FeedbackCounts AS ( -- 4. 交流反馈数量 SELECT t.id as textbook_id, COUNT(dtr.id) AS communicationFeedbackCount FROM textbook t LEFT JOIN discussion_topic dt ON t.id = dt.textbook_id LEFT JOIN discussion_topic_reply dtr ON dt.id = dtr.topic_id GROUP BY t.id ) -- 5. 组合并计算热度值 SELECT t.id AS "textbookId", t.textbook_name AS "textbookName", COALESCE(rc.readerCount, 0) AS "readerCount", COALESCE(rd.readingDurationMinutes, 0) AS "readingDurationMinutes", COALESCE(ac.teachingActivityCount, 0) AS "teachingActivityCount", COALESCE(fc.communicationFeedbackCount, 0) AS "communicationFeedbackCount", ( COALESCE(rc.readerCount, 0) * 10 + COALESCE(rd.readingDurationMinutes, 0) * 2 + COALESCE(ac.teachingActivityCount, 0) * 5 + COALESCE(fc.communicationFeedbackCount, 0) * 3 ) AS "popularityScore" FROM textbook t LEFT JOIN ReaderCounts rc ON t.id = rc.textbook_id LEFT JOIN ReadingDurations rd ON t.id = rd.textbook_id LEFT JOIN ActivityCounts ac ON t.id = ac.textbook_id LEFT JOIN FeedbackCounts fc ON t.id = fc.textbook_id WHERE t.release_status = '1' ORDER BY "popularityScore" DESC

WITH ReaderCounts AS ( -- 1. 阅读人数 SELECT textbook_id, COUNT(DISTINCT creator) AS readerCount FROM learning_log GROUP BY textbook_id ), ReadingDurations AS ( -- 2. 阅读时长（分钟） SELECT textbook_id, COUNT(*) AS readingDurationMinutes FROM ( SELECT textbook_id, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM age(LEAD(add_datetime, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY creator, textbook_id ORDER BY add_datetime), add_datetime)) as diff_seconds FROM learning_log ) AS durations WHERE diff_seconds BETWEEN 55 AND 65 GROUP BY textbook_id ), ActivityCounts AS ( -- 3. 教学活动数量 SELECT textbook_id, COUNT(*) AS teachingActivityCount FROM discussion_topic WHERE identity_type = 1 GROUP BY textbook_id ), FeedbackCounts AS ( -- 4. 交流反馈数量 SELECT t.id as textbook_id, COUNT(dtr.id) AS communicationFeedbackCount FROM textbook t LEFT JOIN discussion_topic dt ON t.id = dt.textbook_id LEFT JOIN discussion_topic_reply dtr ON dt.id = dtr.topic_id GROUP BY t.id ) -- 5. 组合并计算热度值 SELECT t.id AS "textbookId", t.textbook_name AS "textbookName", COALESCE(rc.readerCount, 0) AS "readerCount", COALESCE(rd.readingDurationMinutes, 0) AS "readingDurationMinutes", COALESCE(ac.teachingActivityCount, 0) AS "teachingActivityCount", COALESCE(fc.communicationFeedbackCount, 0) AS "communicationFeedbackCount", ( COALESCE(rc.readerCount, 0) * 10 + COALESCE(rd.readingDurationMinutes, 0) * 2 + COALESCE(ac.teachingActivityCount, 0) * 5 + COALESCE(fc.communicationFeedbackCount, 0) * 3 ) AS "popularityScore" FROM textbook t LEFT JOIN ReaderCounts rc ON t.id = rc.textbook_id LEFT JOIN ReadingDurations rd ON t.id = rd.textbook_id LEFT JOIN ActivityCounts ac ON t.id = ac.textbook_id LEFT JOIN FeedbackCounts fc ON t.id = fc.textbook_id WHERE t.release_status = '1' ORDER BY "popularityScore" DESC

SELECT t.id AS "textbookId", t.textbook_name AS "textbookName", COALESCE(reader_stats.reader_count, 0) as "readerCount", COALESCE(activity_stats.teaching_activity_count, 0) as "teachingActivityCount", COALESCE(material_stats.material_count, 0) as "materialCount", COALESCE(feedback_stats.communication_feedback_count, 0) as "communicationFeedbackCount", COALESCE(ideological_stats.ideological_material_count, 0) as "ideologicalMaterialCount", -- 使用修正后的答题正确率 COALESCE(correct_stats.question_correct_rate, 0) as "questionCorrectRate", COALESCE(participation_stats.communication_participation_count, 0) as "communicationParticipationCount", COALESCE(annotation_stats.annotation_count, 0) as "annotationCount" FROM textbook t LEFT JOIN ( -- 统计阅读人数 SELECT ll.textbook_id, COUNT(DISTINCT ll.creator) as reader_count FROM learning_log ll GROUP BY ll.textbook_id ) reader_stats ON t.id = reader_stats.textbook_id LEFT JOIN ( -- 统计教学活动数量 SELECT dt.textbook_id, COUNT(*) as teaching_activity_count FROM discussion_topic dt WHERE dt.identity_type = 1 GROUP BY dt.textbook_id ) activity_stats ON t.id = activity_stats.textbook_id LEFT JOIN ( -- 统计素材数量 SELECT mtm.textbook_id, COUNT(*) as material_count FROM materials_textbook_mapping mtm GROUP BY mtm.textbook_id ) material_stats ON t.id = material_stats.textbook_id LEFT JOIN ( -- 统计交流反馈数量 SELECT dt.textbook_id, COUNT(dtr.id) as communication_feedback_count FROM discussion_topic dt LEFT JOIN discussion_topic_reply dtr ON dt.id = dtr.topic_id GROUP BY dt.textbook_id ) feedback_stats ON t.id = feedback_stats.textbook_id LEFT JOIN ( -- 统计教学思政数量 SELECT im.textbook_id, COUNT(*) as ideological_material_count FROM ideological_material im GROUP BY im.textbook_id ) ideological_stats ON t.id = ideological_stats.textbook_id -- 修正后的答题正确率统计 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT tqb.textbook_id, -- 平均得分率（正确的计算方式） ROUND(AVG( CASE WHEN qbl.total_score > 0 THEN sfg.final_score * 1.0 / qbl.total_score ELSE 0 END ) * 100, 2) as question_correct_rate FROM teaching_question_bank tqb -- 题库总分 INNER JOIN ( SELECT bank_id, SUM(score) as total_score FROM questions_banks_list GROUP BY bank_id ) qbl ON tqb.id = qbl.bank_id -- 学生答题（每个学生取最高分，避免扇入） LEFT JOIN ( SELECT bank_id, student_id, MAX(final_score) as final_score FROM student_final_grade GROUP BY bank_id, student_id ) sfg ON tqb.id = sfg.bank_id WHERE tqb.status = 1 GROUP BY tqb.textbook_id ) correct_stats ON t.id = correct_stats.textbook_id LEFT JOIN ( -- 统计交流反馈参与量 SELECT dt.textbook_id, COUNT(DISTINCT dtr.creator) as communication_participation_count FROM discussion_topic dt LEFT JOIN discussion_topic_reply dtr ON dt.id = dtr.topic_id GROUP BY dt.textbook_id ) participation_stats ON t.id = participation_stats.textbook_id LEFT JOIN ( -- 统计知识点批注量 SELECT ta.textbook_id, COUNT(*) as annotation_count FROM teacher_annotation ta GROUP BY ta.textbook_id ) annotation_stats ON t.id = annotation_stats.textbook_id WHERE t.release_status = '1'
AND t.textbook_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{textbookName}, '%')
ORDER BY t.textbook_name

SELECT t.id AS "textbookId", t.textbook_name AS "textbookName", COALESCE(reader_stats.reader_count, 0) as "readerCount", COALESCE(activity_stats.teaching_activity_count, 0) as "teachingActivityCount", COALESCE(material_stats.material_count, 0) as "materialCount", COALESCE(feedback_stats.communication_feedback_count, 0) as "communicationFeedbackCount", COALESCE(ideological_stats.ideological_material_count, 0) as "ideologicalMaterialCount", COALESCE(question_stats.question_correct_rate, 0) as "questionCorrectRate", COALESCE(participation_stats.communication_participation_count, 0) as "communicationParticipationCount", COALESCE(annotation_stats.annotation_count, 0) as "annotationCount" FROM textbook t INNER JOIN ( -- 教师作为作者的教材 SELECT DISTINCT t.id as textbook_id FROM textbook t WHERE t.creator = #{userId} AND t.release_status = '1'
UNION
-- 教师作为协作者的教材 SELECT DISTINCT t.id as textbook_id FROM textbook t INNER JOIN textbook_authority ta ON t.id = ta.textbook_id WHERE ta.user_id = #{userId} AND ta.authority_type = 1 AND t.release_status = '1' ) teacher_textbooks ON t.id = teacher_textbooks.textbook_id LEFT JOIN ( -- 统计阅读人数（统计该教材关联班级中的所有学生，与reader-statistics接口保持一致） SELECT ctl.textbook_id, COUNT(DISTINCT s.id) as reader_count FROM student s INNER JOIN user_class_list ucl ON s.user_id = ucl.user_id INNER JOIN course_class_list ccl ON ucl.class_id = ccl.class_id INNER JOIN course_textbook_list ctl ON ccl.course_id = ctl.course_id WHERE ucl.type = 1 GROUP BY ctl.textbook_id ) reader_stats ON t.id = reader_stats.textbook_id LEFT JOIN ( -- 统计教学活动数量 SELECT dt.textbook_id, COUNT(*) as teaching_activity_count FROM discussion_topic dt GROUP BY dt.textbook_id ) activity_stats ON t.id = activity_stats.textbook_id LEFT JOIN ( -- 统计素材数量 SELECT mtm.textbook_id, COUNT(*) as material_count FROM materials_textbook_mapping mtm GROUP BY mtm.textbook_id ) material_stats ON t.id = material_stats.textbook_id LEFT JOIN ( -- 统计交流反馈数量 SELECT dt.textbook_id, COUNT(dtr.id) as communication_feedback_count FROM discussion_topic dt LEFT JOIN discussion_topic_reply dtr ON dt.id = dtr.topic_id GROUP BY dt.textbook_id ) feedback_stats ON t.id = feedback_stats.textbook_id LEFT JOIN ( -- 统计教学思政数量 SELECT im.textbook_id, COUNT(*) as ideological_material_count FROM ideological_material im GROUP BY im.textbook_id ) ideological_stats ON t.id = ideological_stats.textbook_id LEFT JOIN ( -- 统计答题正确率 SELECT tqb.textbook_id, CASE WHEN SUM(qbl.total_score) > 0 THEN ROUND((SUM(sfg.final_score) / SUM(qbl.total_score)) * 100, 2) ELSE 0 END as question_correct_rate FROM teaching_question_bank tqb LEFT JOIN ( SELECT bank_id, SUM(score) as total_score FROM questions_banks_list GROUP BY bank_id ) qbl ON tqb.id = qbl.bank_id LEFT JOIN student_final_grade sfg ON tqb.id = sfg.bank_id WHERE tqb.status = 1 GROUP BY tqb.textbook_id ) question_stats ON t.id = question_stats.textbook_id LEFT JOIN ( -- 统计交流反馈参与量 SELECT dt.textbook_id, COUNT(DISTINCT dtr.creator) as communication_participation_count FROM discussion_topic dt LEFT JOIN discussion_topic_reply dtr ON dt.id = dtr.topic_id GROUP BY dt.textbook_id ) participation_stats ON t.id = participation_stats.textbook_id LEFT JOIN ( -- 统计知识点批注量 SELECT ta.textbook_id, COUNT(*) as annotation_count FROM teacher_annotation ta GROUP BY ta.textbook_id ) annotation_stats ON t.id = annotation_stats.textbook_id WHERE 1=1
AND t.textbook_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{textbookName}, '%')
ORDER BY t.textbook_name

SELECT s.id as "studentId", s.name as "studentName", COALESCE(reading_stats.reading_duration, 0) as "readingDuration", CASE WHEN COALESCE(reading_stats.reading_duration, 0) >= 300 THEN '高' WHEN COALESCE(reading_stats.reading_duration, 0) >= 150 THEN '中' ELSE '低' END as "learningBehavior", COALESCE(chapter_stats.chapter_count, 0) as "chapterCount", reading_stats.last_reading_time as "lastReadingTime", COALESCE(progress_stats.progress_percentage, 0) as "progressPercentage" FROM student s LEFT JOIN ( -- 统计学生阅读时长 SELECT creator, COUNT(CASE WHEN diff_seconds BETWEEN 55 AND 65 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) as reading_duration, MAX(add_datetime) as last_reading_time FROM ( SELECT ll.creator, ll.add_datetime, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM age(LEAD(ll.add_datetime, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY ll.creator, ll.textbook_id ORDER BY ll.add_datetime), ll.add_datetime)) as diff_seconds FROM learning_log ll WHERE ll.textbook_id = #{textbookId} ) AS user_reading_intervals GROUP BY creator ) reading_stats ON s.user_id = reading_stats.creator LEFT JOIN ( -- 统计学生阅读章节数 SELECT ll.creator, COUNT(DISTINCT ll.catalogue_id) as chapter_count FROM learning_log ll WHERE ll.textbook_id = #{textbookId} GROUP BY ll.creator ) chapter_stats ON s.user_id = chapter_stats.creator LEFT JOIN ( -- 统计学习进度 SELECT ll.creator, ROUND((COUNT(DISTINCT ll.catalogue_id) * 100.0 / ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM textbook_catalog WHERE textbook_id = #{textbookId} )), 2) as progress_percentage FROM learning_log ll WHERE ll.textbook_id = #{textbookId} GROUP BY ll.creator ) progress_stats ON s.user_id = progress_stats.creator -- Find all students who have ever read this book WHERE s.user_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT creator FROM learning_log WHERE textbook_id = #{textbookId})
SELECT * FROM learning_log WHERE textbook_id = #{textbookId}
SELECT dtr.* FROM discussion_topic_reply dtr INNER JOIN discussion_topic dt ON dtr.topic_id = dt.id WHERE dt.textbook_id = #{textbookId}

SELECT dtr.* FROM discussion_topic_reply dtr INNER JOIN discussion_topic dt ON dtr.topic_id = dt.id WHERE dt.textbook_id = #{textbookId} AND dtr.add_datetime BETWEEN CAST(#{startTime} AS TIMESTAMP) AND CAST(#{endTime} AS TIMESTAMP)

SELECT tc.id as "chapterId", tc.catalog_name as "chapterName", tc.catalog_level as "chapterLevel", tc.father_catalog_id as "parentChapterId", COALESCE(stat.questionBankCount, 0) as "questionBankCount", COALESCE(stat.totalAnswerCount, 0) as "totalAnswerCount", COALESCE(stat.correctAnswerCount, 0) as "correctAnswerCount", CASE WHEN COALESCE(stat.totalAnswerCount, 0) = 0 THEN 0.0 ELSE ROUND(COALESCE(stat.correctAnswerCount, 0) * 100.0 / stat.totalAnswerCount, 2) END as "correctRate" FROM textbook_catalog tc LEFT JOIN ( -- 按照您的思路：先查题库，再查总分，再计算正确率 SELECT tqb.textbook_catalog_id, COUNT(DISTINCT tqb.id) as questionBankCount, COUNT(sfg.id) as totalAnswerCount, -- 计算正确率：总得分 / 总满分 * 100 CASE WHEN SUM(qbl.total_score) > 0 THEN ROUND((SUM(sfg.final_score) / SUM(qbl.total_score)) * 100, 2) ELSE 0 END as correctRate, -- 统计正确作答次数（正确率 >= 60% 视为正确） SUM(CASE WHEN qbl.total_score > 0 AND (sfg.final_score / qbl.total_score) >= 0.6 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as correctAnswerCount FROM teaching_question_bank tqb -- 步骤1：查出教材对应的所有题库 LEFT JOIN ( -- 步骤2：统计每个题库的总分 SELECT bank_id, SUM(score) as total_score FROM questions_banks_list GROUP BY bank_id ) qbl ON tqb.id = qbl.bank_id -- 步骤3：联查学生最终成绩表 LEFT JOIN student_final_grade sfg ON tqb.id = sfg.bank_id WHERE tqb.textbook_id = #{textbookId} AND tqb.status = 1 GROUP BY tqb.textbook_catalog_id ) stat ON tc.id = stat.textbook_catalog_id WHERE tc.textbook_id = #{textbookId} ORDER BY tc.catalog_level, tc.sort

SELECT t.id AS "textbookId", t.textbook_name AS "textbookName", COALESCE(reader_stats.reader_count, 0) as "readerCount", COALESCE(activity_stats.teaching_activity_count, 0) as "teachingActivityCount", COALESCE(material_stats.material_count, 0) as "materialCount", COALESCE(feedback_stats.communication_feedback_count, 0) as "communicationFeedbackCount", COALESCE(ideological_stats.ideological_material_count, 0) as "ideologicalMaterialCount", -- 使用修正后的答题正确率 COALESCE(correct_stats.question_correct_rate, 0) as "questionCorrectRate", COALESCE(participation_stats.communication_participation_count, 0) as "communicationParticipationCount", COALESCE(annotation_stats.annotation_count, 0) as "annotationCount", COALESCE(image_stats.image_count, 0) as "imageMaterialCount", COALESCE(video_stats.video_count, 0) as "videoMaterialCount", COALESCE(audio_stats.audio_count, 0) as "audioMaterialCount", COALESCE(model3d_stats.model3d_count, 0) as "model3dMaterialCount", COALESCE(link_stats.link_count, 0) as "linkMaterialCount", COALESCE(ppt_stats.ppt_count, 0) as "pptMaterialCount", COALESCE(pdf_stats.pdf_count, 0) as "pdfMaterialCount", COALESCE(word_stats.word_count, 0) as "wordMaterialCount", COALESCE(excel_stats.excel_count, 0) as "excelMaterialCount", COALESCE(h5_stats.h5_count, 0) as "h5MaterialCount", COALESCE(simulation_stats.simulation_count, 0) as "simulationMaterialCount", COALESCE(other_stats.other_count, 0) as "otherMaterialCount" FROM textbook t INNER JOIN ( -- 教师作为作者的教材 SELECT DISTINCT t.id as textbook_id FROM textbook t WHERE t.creator = #{userId} AND t.release_status = '1'
UNION
-- 教师作为协作者的教材 SELECT DISTINCT t.id as textbook_id FROM textbook t INNER JOIN textbook_authority ta ON t.id = ta.textbook_id WHERE ta.user_id = #{userId} AND ta.authority_type = 1 AND t.release_status = '1' ) teacher_textbooks ON t.id = teacher_textbooks.textbook_id LEFT JOIN ( -- 统计阅读人数 SELECT ctl.textbook_id, COUNT(DISTINCT s.id) as reader_count FROM student s INNER JOIN user_class_list ucl ON s.user_id = ucl.user_id INNER JOIN course_class_list ccl ON ucl.class_id = ccl.class_id INNER JOIN course_textbook_list ctl ON ccl.course_id = ctl.course_id WHERE ucl.type = 1 GROUP BY ctl.textbook_id ) reader_stats ON t.id = reader_stats.textbook_id LEFT JOIN ( -- 统计教学活动数量 SELECT dt.textbook_id, COUNT(*) as teaching_activity_count FROM discussion_topic dt GROUP BY dt.textbook_id ) activity_stats ON t.id = activity_stats.textbook_id LEFT JOIN ( -- 统计素材数量 SELECT mtm.textbook_id, COUNT(*) as material_count FROM materials_textbook_mapping mtm GROUP BY mtm.textbook_id ) material_stats ON t.id = material_stats.textbook_id LEFT JOIN ( -- 统计交流反馈数量 SELECT dt.textbook_id, COUNT(dtr.id) as communication_feedback_count FROM discussion_topic dt LEFT JOIN discussion_topic_reply dtr ON dt.id = dtr.topic_id GROUP BY dt.textbook_id ) feedback_stats ON t.id = feedback_stats.textbook_id LEFT JOIN ( -- 统计教学思政数量 SELECT im.textbook_id, COUNT(*) as ideological_material_count FROM ideological_material im GROUP BY im.textbook_id ) ideological_stats ON t.id = ideological_stats.textbook_id -- 修正后的答题正确率统计（关键修改部分） LEFT JOIN ( SELECT tqb.textbook_id, -- 平均得分率（正确的计算方式） ROUND(AVG( CASE WHEN qbl.total_score > 0 THEN sfg.final_score * 1.0 / qbl.total_score ELSE 0 END ) * 100, 2) as question_correct_rate FROM teaching_question_bank tqb -- 题库总分 INNER JOIN ( SELECT bank_id, SUM(score) as total_score FROM questions_banks_list GROUP BY bank_id ) qbl ON tqb.id = qbl.bank_id -- 学生答题（每个学生取最高分，避免扇入） LEFT JOIN ( SELECT bank_id, student_id, MAX(final_score) as final_score FROM student_final_grade GROUP BY bank_id, student_id ) sfg ON tqb.id = sfg.bank_id WHERE tqb.status = 1 GROUP BY tqb.textbook_id ) correct_stats ON t.id = correct_stats.textbook_id LEFT JOIN ( -- 统计交流反馈参与量 SELECT dt.textbook_id, COUNT(DISTINCT dtr.creator) as communication_participation_count FROM discussion_topic dt LEFT JOIN discussion_topic_reply dtr ON dt.id = dtr.topic_id GROUP BY dt.textbook_id ) participation_stats ON t.id = participation_stats.textbook_id LEFT JOIN ( -- 统计知识点批注量 SELECT ta.textbook_id, COUNT(*) as annotation_count FROM teacher_annotation ta GROUP BY ta.textbook_id ) annotation_stats ON t.id = annotation_stats.textbook_id LEFT JOIN ( -- 统计图片素材数量 SELECT mtm.textbook_id, COUNT(*) as image_count FROM materials_textbook_mapping mtm JOIN teaching_materials tm ON mtm.material_id = tm.id WHERE tm.type = 'image' GROUP BY mtm.textbook_id ) image_stats ON t.id = image_stats.textbook_id LEFT JOIN ( -- 统计视频素材数量 SELECT mtm.textbook_id, COUNT(*) as video_count FROM materials_textbook_mapping mtm JOIN teaching_materials tm ON mtm.material_id = tm.id WHERE tm.type = 'video' GROUP BY mtm.textbook_id ) video_stats ON t.id = video_stats.textbook_id LEFT JOIN ( -- 统计音频素材数量 SELECT mtm.textbook_id, COUNT(*) as audio_count FROM materials_textbook_mapping mtm JOIN teaching_materials tm ON mtm.material_id = tm.id WHERE tm.type = 'audio' GROUP BY mtm.textbook_id ) audio_stats ON t.id = audio_stats.textbook_id LEFT JOIN ( -- 统计3D模型素材数量 SELECT mtm.textbook_id, COUNT(*) as model3d_count FROM materials_textbook_mapping mtm JOIN teaching_materials tm ON mtm.material_id = tm.id WHERE tm.type = '3DModel' GROUP BY mtm.textbook_id ) model3d_stats ON t.id = model3d_stats.textbook_id LEFT JOIN ( -- 统计链接素材数量 SELECT mtm.textbook_id, COUNT(*) as link_count FROM materials_textbook_mapping mtm JOIN teaching_materials tm ON mtm.material_id = tm.id WHERE tm.type = 'link' GROUP BY mtm.textbook_id ) link_stats ON t.id = link_stats.textbook_id LEFT JOIN ( -- 统计PPT素材数量 SELECT mtm.textbook_id, COUNT(*) as ppt_count FROM materials_textbook_mapping mtm JOIN teaching_materials tm ON mtm.material_id = tm.id WHERE tm.type = 'ppt' GROUP BY mtm.textbook_id ) ppt_stats ON t.id = ppt_stats.textbook_id LEFT JOIN ( -- 统计PDF素材数量 SELECT mtm.textbook_id, COUNT(*) as pdf_count FROM materials_textbook_mapping mtm JOIN teaching_materials tm ON mtm.material_id = tm.id WHERE tm.type = 'pdf' GROUP BY mtm.textbook_id ) pdf_stats ON t.id = pdf_stats.textbook_id LEFT JOIN ( -- 统计Word素材数量 SELECT mtm.textbook_id, COUNT(*) as word_count FROM materials_textbook_mapping mtm JOIN teaching_materials tm ON mtm.material_id = tm.id WHERE tm.type = 'word' GROUP BY mtm.textbook_id ) word_stats ON t.id = word_stats.textbook_id LEFT JOIN ( -- 统计Excel素材数量 SELECT mtm.textbook_id, COUNT(*) as excel_count FROM materials_textbook_mapping mtm JOIN teaching_materials tm ON mtm.material_id = tm.id WHERE tm.type = 'excel' GROUP BY mtm.textbook_id ) excel_stats ON t.id = excel_stats.textbook_id LEFT JOIN ( -- 统计H5页面素材数量 SELECT mtm.textbook_id, COUNT(*) as h5_count FROM materials_textbook_mapping mtm JOIN teaching_materials tm ON mtm.material_id = tm.id WHERE tm.type = 'H5' GROUP BY mtm.textbook_id ) h5_stats ON t.id = h5_stats.textbook_id LEFT JOIN ( -- 统计3D仿真素材数量 SELECT mtm.textbook_id, COUNT(*) as simulation_count FROM materials_textbook_mapping mtm JOIN teaching_materials tm ON mtm.material_id = tm.id WHERE tm.type = 'simulation' GROUP BY mtm.textbook_id ) simulation_stats ON t.id = simulation_stats.textbook_id LEFT JOIN ( -- 统计其他类型素材数量 SELECT mtm.textbook_id, COUNT(*) as other_count FROM materials_textbook_mapping mtm JOIN teaching_materials tm ON mtm.material_id = tm.id WHERE tm.type = 'other' GROUP BY mtm.textbook_id ) other_stats ON t.id = other_stats.textbook_id WHERE 1=1
AND t.textbook_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{textbookName}, '%')
ORDER BY t.textbook_name
